center.name: 乌卡亚利大区
center.summary: 乌卡亚利大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括红紋鬚鴷、Fiery-capped manakin、Fiery-throated fruiteater等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Peru it occurs in the departments of Ucayali, Cuzco, Madre de Dios, and Puno

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in central and southern Peru from the Department of Huánuco south into the Department of Puno; it might also occur in the western part of the Department of Ucayali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its principal range in that country is in the southeast in Ucayali and Madre de Dios.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fiery-throated fruiteater is found in humid tropical forests on the eastern slopes of the Andes. Its range extends from southern Colombia, through Ecuador to northern Peru, and its altitudinal range is from above sea level, although it has been observed at Cerros del Sira, in the Ucayali Region of Peru, at around . Fiery-throated fruiteater (Pipreola chlorolepidota) female on nest Sumaco.jpg|female on nest, Ecuador Fiery-throated fruiteater (Pipreola chlorolepidota) female on nest with male Sumaco.jpg|female on same nest with male

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: bolivianum is found in eastern Peru from Ucayali Department south into northern Puno Department,{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: chaplinae: eastern slope of the Andes from Colombia's Cauca Department south through eastern Ecuador into northern Peru's Amazonas and Loreto departments and separately in San Martín and Ucayali departments The plain-backed antpitta inhabits the floor and understory in the interior and edges of humid to wet montane forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Selva cacique is endemic to eastern Peru where it is found in the regions of Ucayali, Cusco and Madre de Dios, and the adjoining Acre State in northwestern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-lined antbird is found in southeastern Peru from the Department of Ucayali south to the Department of Puno, in adjoining far western Acre state of Brazil, and in northwestern Bolivia's Pando and La Paz departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (It was mistakenly listed as being in Ucayali, Peru, in its formal description.) There it inhabits humid, mossy, sub-montane and montane forest at elevations between
